name: docs-cockpit
description: Aggregate scattered project markdown (PRD, spec, plan, RFC, tasks, README, session memory) into ONE file:// openable HTML cockpit — sidebar nav, in-page rendering, optional YAML-frontmatter-driven kanban + KPI dashboard. Ships THREE skills: `docs-cockpit` (set up / maintain the cockpit), `docs-cockpit-status` (read docs/state.json and answer status / progress / standup questions), `docs-cockpit-update` (auto-upgrade when CLI is outdated). No server, no Docusaurus/Sphinx multi-page setup.
